summary: Website for selling natural food colour named Whisk and Bloom
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Natural food colour hero background with vibrant botanical elements and food preparations (hero-background.dim_1920x1080.png)
- Whisk and Bloom logo with elegant botanical design (logo.dim_400x400.png)
- Red natural food colour product image showing vibrant beetroot-based colour (product-red.dim_800x800.png)
- Yellow natural food colour product image showing turmeric-based colour (product-yellow.dim_800x800.png)
- Blue natural food colour product image showing butterfly pea-based colour (product-blue.dim_800x800.png)
- Green natural food colour product image showing spirulina-based colour (product-green.dim_800x800.png)

existing_features.title: Create a homepage that showcases Whisk and Bloom as a natural food colour brand with a hero section, product highlights, and brand story
Implement a product catalog page displaying natural food colour products with images, names, descriptions, and prices
Create a shopping cart system that allows users to add products, view cart contents, and see total price
Implement a checkout flow where users can review their order and complete purchase

Design a cohesive visual theme inspired by natural, organic food aesthetics with warm earth tones, botanical elements, and clean modern typography that emphasizes the natural and artisanal quality of the food colours
Create an individual product detail page showing full product information, larger images, and add to cart functionality
